case_title: COX, DENNIS JR. VS CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COX, DENNIS JR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION BRAUNREITER, EILEEN F., AGENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-24-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-29-2005 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CLAIM RETURNED BY SHERIFF'S DEPT. NEEDS 45 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION
FOUR COPIES OF PLTF'S CLAIM FORWARDED TO THE SHERIFF DEPT PER INSTRUCTION OF THE PLTF. FOUR COPIES MAILED BACK TO BETTY COX AT ADDRESS.
A COPY OF THE RESET CASE WAS SENT TO THE PLTF AT THE ADDRESS: P.O. BOX 5853, MARYSVILLE CA 95901.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COX, DENNIS JR. AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION BRAUNREITER, EILEEN F., AGENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
